title: MyBiz: Pomodoro Desk Tycoon
description:
MyBiz — A Cozy Office, Run on Pomodoros Build the most charming office on the block while you actually get work done. MyBiz is a desktop companion that turns your real focus sessions into in-game progress — every keystroke, every click, every Pomodoro funds a tiny pixel-art business that grows alongside your day.

 

 

How it worksStart a 25-minute Pomodoro and the office comes alive. Your typing fills a Keys bar, your clicks fill a Clicks bar, your music fills a Music bar — hit thresholds, earn cash and XP, level up, hire staff, expand to new floors. Take a break and the timer mode swaps to short or long break automatically. Skip out early? You still get prorated rewards. 

Key features• Pomodoro that pays you back — 25/5/15 cycles tracked across the day, with cash and XP rewards calibrated so a single focused session feels meaningful. 

• Build a working office — buy desks, chairs, plants, lamps, recreation. Each piece of decor boosts staff output. Renovate floors (1F → 2F → 3F+), swap walls, doors, stairs, flooring. 

• Hire a team — staff sit at their desks and add passive bonus rewards to every Pomodoro you run. Each one costs a daily salary though, so growing your office means balancing payroll against output. Watch them work while you work.

• Keep them happy — every staffer has a personal mood bar that slowly decays. Music, fresh decor, and shared coin grabs lift it back up. Happier teams output more — and play better at the foosball table on breaks 

• Customize your character — hair, hat, top, bottom, shoes — earned or bought, swap anytime.

 

Tools that help you focus• Music player — built-in playlist across Pop, R&B, Lo-fi, Jazz, Classic, Bossa, Funk. Auto-advance through the queue, loop the playlist, drop in your own tracks. 

• Ambience mixer — rain, forest, ocean, fireplace, wind, whatever puts you in the zone. Layer multiple sounds with individual volumes; resumes automatically next time you launch. 

• Quick tools — sticky notes, to-do list, clipboard history, whiteboard scratchpad — all one click away.

 

Cozy minigames for breaksWhen you need to step away from work without leaving the app: play chess against a built-in AI, beat your office in foosball or flappy bird, jam on a guitar rhythm game, watch fish swim and feed the aquarium, or just doodle on the whiteboard. 

Compact mode + monitor dockSwitch to the always-on-top mini window when you need the screen. Or attach the full window to the left or right edge of your monitor as a permanent productivity sidebar — your office, your timer, your stats, always glanceable.

 

 

Themes you unlock by workingEarn cash through Pomodoros and unlock 10 themes — solid palettes (Midnight Office, Forest Den, Cherry Blossom), gradient skies (Sunset Lobby, Ocean Tide, Aurora Borealis), and texture finishes (Paper Notebook, Wood Workshop, Marble Lounge). The whole UI re-skins instantly — buttons, backdrops, the office sky behind your sprites, even the mini window. 

 

Track your milestones25 achievements, from "First Day at Work" to "Pomodoro Empire" — natural progression rewards for first profit, first decor, focus streaks, click champions, and the long climb to level 12. Native Steam achievements with unlocked icons, all syncing to your profile. 

Made for the workday• Launch on startup, always-on-top, mute when unfocused — settings to fit your real workflow 

• Backup & restore your save as a .mybiz file — never lose progress 

• Hourly grandfather clock chimes (optional) 

• Light footprint, low CPU — runs alongside your real work tools, not in front of them 

Stop pretending you're not going to Pomodoro again tomorrow. MyBiz turns the time you'd spend anyway into something cozy.
description_short: A cozy pixel-art office sim powered by your real Pomodoros. Focus sessions earn cash + XP — decorate, hire staff, level up. Music, ambience, break-time minigames. Productivity tool by day, tycoon by every minute.
